claims.text: Can you walk me through your commercial experience building REST API services with Laravel, including the scale of enterprise clients you supported?
How do you approach schema design and query optimization when working with MySQL databases?
What's your experience with PostgreSQL specifically, versus other relational databases you've used?
claims.reframing_note: Candidate lists PostgreSQL as a database skill; no achievement narrative names a specific PostgreSQL project, so the question probes depth rather than asserting a specific PostgreSQL deployment.

claims.text: Tell me about how you've used Docker and CI/CD pipelines (Travis CI, GitHub Actions) to standardize delivery across teams.
What AWS platforms have you worked with in production systems?
What Azure platforms have you worked with in production systems?
How have you approached security hardening in your engineering work, especially around production environments?
claims.reframing_note: Reframed toward the offer's 'secure, auditable authentication' language; the candidate span is the general 'Security hardening' skill entry, not an OAuth2/JWT-specific claim.

claims.text: Describe your experience integrating third-party services like payment gateways or CRMs into a backend platform.
What's your English proficiency level, and how comfortable are you working in an English-speaking team?

Situation: I was leading the Drupal 8-11 multi-site platform for Otsuka, a multinational healthcare client, with direct accountability for architecture decisions and release quality across a 20-person dev team within a 47-member delivery org.
Task: I needed to standardize local environments and CI/CD to reduce environment drift and onboarding time across the delivery team.
Action: I owned the deployment pipelines and Drupal/PHP update cycles, introducing Capistrano automation and CI/CD tooling to achieve zero-downtime releases.
Result: Environment-related regression incidents dropped by approximately 30% across release cycles.
claims.reframing_note: Quantified framing highlights the '~30%' figure already present in the cited achievement; no rounding or estimation applied beyond the source text.

claims.text: Situation: Enterprise clients needed backend services built on Laravel that could integrate cleanly with multiple external systems.
Task: The team needed reliable REST and SOAP integrations connecting CMS platforms with third-party services across up to 5 concurrent client projects.

Action: I developed and maintained Laravel-based REST API services using OOP/MVC principles, PSR coding standards, and Eloquent ORM, integrating 10+ third-party APIs including payment gateways, CRMs, and data feeds.
Result: Delivered clean, testable back-end code at production scale for enterprise clients.
Situation: At [empty] Studio, 10+ client sites were compromised, putting production uptime and data integrity at risk.
Task: I needed to remediate each compromised site and prevent any recurrence of the incidents.
Action: I performed proactive security incident response - malware removal, vulnerability identification, and remediation - restoring each site to full production.
Result: Achieved zero recurrence of the security incidents while preserving client uptime and data integrity across the affected portfolio.
My Laravel background is production-proven: I built and maintained Laravel-based REST API services for enterprise clients, integrating 10+ third-party APIs including payment gateways and CRMs.
I've driven CI/CD and containerization practice (Travis CI, GitHub Actions, Docker Compose, Docksal) across the delivery team.
That CI/CD and deployment automation work cut environment-related regression incidents by ~30% across release cycles.
claims.reframing_note: Emphasizes the quantified '~30%' outcome already in the source achievement to speak to the offer's CI/CD requirement.

claims.text: I've led a 20-person engineering team with full architecture and release-quality accountability, which maps directly to this role's lead-level scope.
claims.reframing_note: Reframes the 'Lead Software Engineer' team-leadership fact toward the offer's 'lead' seniority language; no new fact added.

claims.text: My database experience includes MySQL, named in this role's must-have requirements.
My database experience also includes PostgreSQL, named in this role's must-have requirements.
I've worked with AWS in production delivery.
I've worked with Azure in production delivery.

claims.reframing_note: Reframes the general 'Security hardening' skill entry toward the offer's secure/auditable-authentication language; the candidate span does not itself name OAuth2, JWT, or RBAC.
